zh.lifeSummary: 當John Blackett於1345年出生在英國越可爾約克約克 卡素時，他的父親Richard de Blakheved18歲，母親Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh16歲。他於大約1401年5月20日與Margaret de Hastings在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1418年7月25日在英國享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Blackett于1345年出生在英国越可爾約克約克 卡素时，他的父亲Richard de Blakheved18岁，母亲Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh16岁。他于大约1401年5月20日与Margaret de Hastings在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1418年7月25日在英国享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blackett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname for a person with dark or fair hair, from Middle English blak ‘black’ (Old English blæc) or ‘fair’ (Old English blāc) + hed, heved ‘head’. See also Black .

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Blackett was born in 1345, in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard de Blakheved, was 18 and his mother, Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, was 16. He married Margaret de Hastings about 20 May 1401, in Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 25 July 1418, in England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Blackett est né en 1345, à York Castle, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Blakheved, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Hastings environ 20 mai 1401, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1418, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Blackett 1345 in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Blakheved 18 und seine Mutter Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh 16. Er hat um 20. Mai 1401 in Westminster, Middlesex, England Margaret de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Juli 1418 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Blackett è nato il nel 1345 nel York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Blakheved, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Hastings circa 20 maggio 1401, nel Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 25 luglio 1418, nel England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Blackettが1345年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークヨーク カストルで生まれた時，父Richard de Blakhevedは18歳，母Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xhは16歳であった。約1401年5月20日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでMargaret de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1418年7月25日にイギリスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Blackett(이)가 1345년 영국 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Blakheved(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1401년 5월 20일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Margaret de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1418년 7월 25일 영국에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Blackett nasceu em 1345, em York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Blakheved, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Hastings aproximadamente 20 de maio de 1401, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1418, em Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Blackett родился в 1345 г. в местности ерк кастл, ерк, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Blakheved было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Hastings около 20 мая 1401 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 25 июля 1418 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Blackett nació en 1345, en York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Blakheved, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs Christiana de Blakheved x-xh, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margaret de Hastings aproximadamente 20 de mayo de 1401, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 25 de julio de 1418, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
